Field.Name: ConnectionNotMonitored
Field.Description: ConnectionManager does not monitor the state of the Connection

Field.Name: ConnectionNotEstablished
Field.Description: Connection does not exist

Field.Name: ConnectionInitial
Field.Description: Connection is being established, but communication model is not linked to ConnectionEndpoint

Field.Name: ConnectionReady
Field.Description: Connection is established but communication model is disabled

Field.Name: ConnectionPreOperational
Field.Description: Connection is established and enabled, but communication has not started

Field.Name: ConnectionOperational
Field.Description: Connection is established and communication is flowing

Field.Name: ConnectionError
Field.Description: Connection is established and enabled, but communication is not possible due to an endpoint error

uax:Description.uax:Text: ConnectionManager does not monitor the state of the Connection
Connection does not exist
Connection is being established, but communication model is not linked to ConnectionEndpoint
Connection is established but communication model is disabled
Connection is established and enabled, but communication has not started
Connection is established and communication is flowing
Connection is established and enabled, but communication is not possible due to an endpoint error

Field.Name: StartEditing
Field.Description: The ConnectionManager shall allow editing of the ConnectionConfigurationSets.

Field.Name: CommitUpdates
Field.Description: The ConnectionManager shall commit all updates from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.

Field.Name: DiscardUpdates
Field.Description: The ConnectionManager shall discard the updates to the ConnectionConfigurationSets.

uax:Description.uax:Text: The ConnectionManager shall allow editing of the ConnectionConfigurationSets.
The ConnectionManager shall commit all updates from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.
The ConnectionManager shall discard the updates to the ConnectionConfigurationSets.

Field.Name: NoError
Field.Description: This is returned if no processing has been done or no error exists

Field.Name: UnknownStatus
Field.Description: The Connection is not monitored and its status is unknown

Field.Name: Rollback
Field.Description: The Connection was successfully established but was rolled back due to errors in related Connections in this ConnectionConfigurationSet

Field.Name: ProcessingStopped
Field.Description: This Connection processing was stopped due to some other error in the ConnectionConfigurationSet

Field.Name: ConnectionConfigurationSetInvalid
Field.Description: The ConnectionManager could not process this ConnectionConfigurationSet due to a configuration error

Field.Name: GdsConnectionError
Field.Description: There was an error related to establishing a session to the GDS

Field.Name: GdsProcessingError
Field.Description: There was an error related to processing commands with the GDS

Field.Name: AliasNameProcessingError
Field.Description: There was an error related to resolving AliasNames

Field.Name: ExternalSksConnectionError
Field.Description: There was an error related to establishing a session to the SKS

Field.Name: ExternalSksProcessingError
Field.Description: There was an error related to configuring the SKS

Field.Name: TargetServerConnectionError
Field.Description: There was an error related to establishing a session to the target Server

Field.Name: ResolvingNamespacesError
Field.Description: There was an error resolving Namespaces

Field.Name: ResolvingPathsError
Field.Description: There was an error resolving BrowsePaths

Field.Name: VerifyAssetError
Field.Description: There was a verification error on an Asset

Field.Name: VerifyFunctionalEntityError
Field.Description: There was a verification error on a FunctionalEntity

Field.Name: CreateConnectionEndpointError
Field.Description: There was an error creating a ConnectionEndpoint

Field.Name: EstablishControlError
Field.Description: There was an error establishing control of a FunctionalEntity

Field.Name: SetConfigurationDataError
Field.Description: There was an error setting configuration information in the FunctionalEntity

Field.Name: ReassignControlError
Field.Description: There was an error reassigning the control of a FunctionalEntity

Field.Name: ReserveCommunicationIdsError
Field.Description: There was an error related to reserving ids

Field.Name: SetCommunicationConfigurationError
Field.Description: There was an error related to configuring communication

Field.Name: EnableCommunicationError
Field.Description: There was an error enabling communication

Field.Name: CloseConnectionError
Field.Description: There was an error closing a connection

Field.Name: LocalSksKeyPushError
Field.Description: The internal SKS is having a problem with pushing keys to a target Server

Field.Name: RuntimeError
Field.Description: There was an error in a running operation

uax:Description.uax:Text: This is returned if no processing has been done or no error exists
The Connection is not monitored and its status is unknown
The Connection was successfully established but was rolled back due to errors in related Connections in this ConnectionConfigurationSet
This Connection processing was stopped due to some other error in the ConnectionConfigurationSet
The ConnectionManager could not process this ConnectionConfigurationSet due to a configuration error
There was an error related to establishing a session to the GDS
There was an error related to processing commands with the GDS
There was an error related to resolving AliasNames
There was an error related to establishing a session to the SKS
There was an error related to configuring the SKS
There was an error related to establishing a session to the target Server
There was an error resolving Namespaces
There was an error resolving BrowsePaths
There was a verification error on an Asset
There was a verification error on a FunctionalEntity
There was an error creating a ConnectionEndpoint
There was an error establishing control of a FunctionalEntity
There was an error setting configuration information in the FunctionalEntity
There was an error reassigning the control of a FunctionalEntity
There was an error related to reserving ids
There was an error related to configuring communication
There was an error enabling communication
There was an error closing a connection
The internal SKS is having a problem with pushing keys to a target Server
There was an error in a running operation

Field.Name: ActionEstablishConnectionsEnabled
Field.Description: The ConnectionManager shall establish enabled Connections from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.

Field.Name: ActionEstablishConnectionsDisabled
Field.Description: The ConnectionManager shall establish disabled Connections from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.

Field.Name: ActionEstablishConnections
Field.Description: The ConnectionManager shall establish Connections from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.

Field.Name: ActionRemoveConnections
Field.Description: The ConnectionManager shall disable and remove Connections from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.

Field.Name: ActionEnableConnections
Field.Description: The ConnectionManager shall enable Connections from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.

Field.Name: ActionDisableConnections
Field.Description: The ConnectionManager shall disable Connections from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.

uax:Description.uax:Text: The ConnectionManager shall establish enabled Connections from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.
The ConnectionManager shall establish disabled Connections from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.
The ConnectionManager shall establish Connections from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.
The ConnectionManager shall disable and remove Connections from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.
The ConnectionManager shall enable Connections from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.
The ConnectionManager shall disable Connections from the ConnectionConfigurationSets.

Field.Name: ElementAdd
Field.Description: The ConnectionConfigurationSet is added to the ConnectionManager configuration.

Field.Name: ElementRemove
Field.Description: The ConnectionConfigurationSet is removed from the ConnectionManager configuration.

Field.Name: ElementReplace
Field.Description: The ConnectionConfigurationSet is replaced in the ConnectionManager configuration.

Field.Name: EstablishEnabled
Field.Description: The last activity of the ConnectionManager was establishing a connection (enabled).

Field.Name: EstablishDisabled
Field.Description: The last activity of the ConnectionManager was establishing a connection (disabled).

Field.Name: Establish
Field.Description: The last activity of the ConnectionManager was establishing a connection.

Field.Name: Remove
Field.Description: The last activity of the ConnectionManager was to remove a connection.

Field.Name: Enable
Field.Description: The last activity of the ConnectionManager was to enable a connection.

Field.Name: Disable
Field.Description: The last activity of the ConnectionManager was to disable a connection.

Field.Name: Error
Field.Description: If this bit is set, then the last activity of the ConnectionManager failed; if this bit is cleared, then the last activity of the ConnectionManager was a success.

Field.Name: Name
Field.Description: BrowseName of the related <Connection> Node in the ConnectionConfigurationSet

UAVariable.Description: Collects the data type descriptions of http://opcfoundation.org/UA/FX/CM/
Indicates that all of the DataType definitions represented by the DataTypeDictionaryType are available through a DataTypeDefinition Attribute.
Collects the data type descriptions of http://opcfoundation.org/UA/FX/CM/
Indicates that all of the DataType definitions represented by the DataTypeDictionaryType are available through a DataTypeDefinition Attribute.

UAObjectType.Category: UAFX ConnectionManager Configuration Set Processing Events
UAFX ConnectionManager Configuration Set Processing Events
UAFX ConnectionManager Configuration Set Processing Events
UAFX ConnectionManager Configuration Set Processing Events
